# CWE-261 — Weak Encoding for Password (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-261-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"encoding/hex"
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var accountVault sync.Map

// Safe: stores salted SHA-256 digest, not reversible encoding.
func SignupHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	user := r.FormValue("username")
	pw := r.FormValue("password")
	salt := make([]byte, 16)
	_, _ = rand.Read(salt)
	sum := sha256.Sum256(append(salt, []byte(pw)...))
	record := hex.EncodeToString(salt) + ":" + hex.EncodeToString(sum[:])
	accountVault.Store(user, record)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
}
